The '''sistermoon''' was a [[Color/Legends|pale]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]]<ref name="AoT">''[[The Adventures of Teebo: A Tale of Magic and Suspense]]''</ref> which was one of nine of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Endor (planet)/Legends|Endor]] in the [[Outer Moddell systems]]' [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]], located in the [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell subsector]] of the [[Inner Zuma Region]], which was in turn part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Zuma sector/Legends|Zuma sector]].<ref name="TEA" />

The [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] of the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] considered it a sister to their own world, hence the name. At times on Endor, the sistermoon became visible on the horizon, and the moon's light was able to shine through the Forest Moon's [[Cloud/Legends|clouds]]. At one point during the late afternoon, the Ewok [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]] noticed a [[Condor dragon/Legends|mantigrue]]—a type of flying creature—silhouetted against the large moon.<ref name="AoT" />

==Behind the scenes==
The sistermoon appeared in the [[1984]] young-readers book ''[[The Adventures of Teebo: A Tale of Magic and Suspense]]'', written by [[Joe Johnston]].<ref name="AoT" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Endor [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the sistermoon, in grid square H-16.<ref name="TEA" />
